# Plectis

> A public executable atlas of AI-native runtime mechanisms: each component names what it runs or replays, the evidence class behind it, the receipt/source handles to inspect, and the authority ceiling where the claim stops. Read order: mechanisms -> evidence discipline -> local runtime. The mechanisms are the public artifact; evidence records and local result records are the accountability layer, not the product.

Every map below is a generated projection of content-graph.json (the canonical object kernel); none of it is separately authored.

## First local command

- Source checkout: `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m microcosm_core hello --reader agent .`
- Installed checkout: `plectis hello --reader agent <project>`
- First behavior card: `plectis tour --card <project>`

Scope: this is a local-first static/public project doorway. Use it to clone, inspect, and compare source-linked records; release operations, hosted service claims, external model access, source-file changes, claims not supported by the public records, formal-result correctness, production use, financial decisions, and specialist review are outside this doorway's scope.

## Repository

- Public repository (source of record): https://github.com/wcook04/plectis
- Agent entry: AGENTS.md at the repository root

Objects: 876 across 16 kinds.

## Object families (coverage)

- anti_principle: 17 objects -- 17 routed, 17 searchable, 17 source-linked, 0 omitted
- area: 7 objects -- 7 routed, 7 searchable, 0 source-linked, 0 omitted
- axiom: 12 objects -- 12 routed, 12 searchable, 12 source-linked, 0 omitted
- command: 88 objects -- 88 routed, 88 searchable, 88 source-linked, 0 omitted
- component: 88 objects -- 88 routed, 88 searchable, 88 source-linked, 0 omitted
- concept: 11 objects -- 11 routed, 11 searchable, 11 source-linked, 0 omitted
- coverage_gap: 3 objects -- 3 routed, 3 searchable, 3 source-linked, 0 omitted
- evidence_class: 5 objects -- 5 routed, 5 searchable, 0 source-linked, 0 omitted
- graph_node: 11 objects -- 11 routed, 11 searchable, 0 source-linked, 0 omitted
- mechanism: 95 objects -- 95 routed, 95 searchable, 95 source-linked, 0 omitted
- page: 13 objects -- 13 routed, 13 searchable, 0 source-linked, 0 omitted
- paper_module: 103 objects -- 103 routed, 103 searchable, 103 source-linked, 0 omitted
- principle: 20 objects -- 20 routed, 20 searchable, 20 source-linked, 0 omitted
- relation: 239 objects -- 239 routed, 239 searchable, 0 source-linked, 0 omitted
- source_ref: 163 objects -- 163 routed, 163 searchable, 163 source-linked, 0 omitted
- standard: 1 objects -- 0 routed, 0 searchable, 0 source-linked, 1 omitted

## Availability objects

These source-linked objects are routed and searchable without promoting them beyond their current source status.

### Coverage gaps

- [Component relation fill](docs/rules-and-ideas.html#coverage-gap-component-relation-fill)
- [Mechanism relation fill](docs/rules-and-ideas.html#coverage-gap-mechanism-relation-fill)
- [Paper module relation fill](docs/rules-and-ideas.html#coverage-gap-paper-module-relation-fill)


## Reader ladder (open in order of need)

- [reader digest](plectis-ai-reader-digest.json): the default AI handoff -- quick_path, canonical_question_routes, component_digest, family_digest, claim_ceiling_index, and provenance, without the deep bodies. Start here.
- [complete text corpus](plectis-ai-reader-complete.json): every public text body -- all component cards, paper-module bodies, doctrine entities, glossary terms, evidence profiles, and page prose -- carried once, deduplicated, in one file. Open this when you want the whole site's text without re-rendered duplication.
- [concise guide](assets/ai-orientation-packet.js): ~16 KB orientation for paste-only workflows -- what Plectis is, the seven areas, the rank legend.
- [reference index](docs/reference.html): the human middle layer -- areas, components, doctrine records, and paper modules in one navigable roster.
- [AI review packet](plectis-ai-review-packet.json): advanced full-text packet -- read_me_first, answer contract, question routes, starter prompts, view descriptors, and the full visible-text record in a single self-describing file.
- [full JSON map](plectis-site-map.json): the raw map without the capsule's instruction layers -- visible_text_index bodies, page text, and diagrams, for automation.
- source of record: the public repository linked from each component's source_links.

## Machine-readable

- [object-map.json](object-map.json): canonical object identity + per-kind coverage
- [content-graph.json](content-graph.json): the canonical kernel
- [projection-status.json](projection-status.json): packet lineage and counts
- [search-index.js](assets/search-index.js): static search records
- [architecture-graph-scene.json](docs/architecture-graph-scene.json): graph topology
- Surface contract: content-graph.json::surface_sync_contract
